heading: Elevation of disputes to the Chief Acquisition Officer
label: 1110 Elevation of disputes to the Chief Acquisition Officer
text: If, after 90 days following the elevation to the Chief Acquisition Officer of any design or other dispute regarding level 1 or level 2 acquisition, the dispute remains unresolved, the Commandant shall provide to the appropriate congressional committees a detailed description of the issue and the rationale underlying the decision taken by the Chief Acquisition Officer to resolve the issue.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1110 was renumbered .section 5110 of this title
